description: Detects hardcoded connection strings, API keys, and secrets in C# string literals. Simplified from Rust: flags all string_literal nodes. Cannot filter by suspicious content patterns (Password=, Bearer, sk_live_, Server=, etc.), logging call context, or config-key variable names. Higher false positive rate.

flag.message: String literal detected -- verify it does not contain hardcoded credentials, connection strings, API keys, or secrets. Use configuration/secrets management instead.
